note: Plan -> PBM -> formulary index for states not yet carrying drug-level data in the app. MA and MD are generated from src/data/formulary.json. Formulary URLs were fetched live on the capture date (fetchedOk).

states.name: New York
states.note: Pharmacy is carved OUT of mainstream Medicaid managed care into one statewide FFS program (NYRx) since 4/1/2023, so the Medicaid MCOs share the single NYRx PDL.

plans.name: NYRx — NYS Medicaid Pharmacy Program (Fee-for-Service)
plans.pbm: Magellan Medicaid Administration (Prime Therapeutics; NYRx fiscal agent / PDP administrator)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (PDP PDL)

plans.name: Healthfirst (Medicaid Managed Care / PHSP) — largest NY Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (Healthfirst Medicaid Rx is administered by NYRx)

plans.name: Fidelis Care (Medicaid Managed Care) — 2nd largest NY Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (Fidelis Medicaid Rx is administered by NYRx)

plans.name: MetroPlus Health Plan (Medicaid Managed Care) — 3rd largest NYC Medicaid MCO
plans.pbm: None at plan level — pharmacy benefit carved out to NYRx (Magellan Medicaid Administration)
plans.formularyLabel: NYRx Preferred Drug List (MetroPlus Medicaid Rx is administered by NYRx)

plans.name: Excellus BlueCross BlueShield (Commercial / Individual & Family) — the NY Blue plan (Lifetime Healthcare; upstate NY)
plans.formularyLabel: Excellus 2026 Metal Plans (Base / Simply Blue Plus / College Blue) 3-Tier Formulary Guide (2981)

plans.name: UnitedHealthcare (Commercial) — largest NY commercial carrier
plans.formularyLabel: UnitedHealthcare Commercial Prescription Drug List (PDL), effective Jan 1 2026

plans.name: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield of New York (Commercial)
plans.formularyLabel: Anthem BCBS New York 2026 Select Drug List — Three-Tier (Individual/HIX)

plans.name: Excellus Medicare BlueActive (PPO) — representative NY Medicare Advantage + Part D plan
plans.formularyLabel: Excellus 2026 Medicare BlueActive (PPO) Formulary — List of Covered Drugs (5-tier MAPD)

states.name: Virginia
states.note: Medicaid MCOs follow the statewide DMAS Common Core Formulary / PDL.

plans.name: Virginia Medicaid (Cardinal Care) Fee-for-Service
plans.pbm: Conduent (DMAS pharmacy benefits administrator / fiscal agent); statewide Common Core Formulary set by DMAS
plans.formularyLabel: Virginia Medicaid Preferred Drug List (PDL) / Common Core Formulary

plans.name: Anthem HealthKeepers Plus (Cardinal Care)
plans.formularyLabel: Anthem HealthKeepers Plus VA Medicaid formulary search (follows statewide PDL / Common Core Formulary)

plans.name: Sentara Community Plan (Cardinal Care)
plans.formularyLabel: Sentara Health Plans prescription drug lists (Medicaid / Sentara Community Plan; follows statewide PDL / Common Core Formulary)

plans.name: UnitedHealthcare Community Plan of Virginia (Cardinal Care)
plans.formularyLabel: UnitedHealthcare Community Plan of Virginia pharmacy resources / PDL search (follows statewide PDL / Common Core Formulary)

plans.name: Aetna Better Health of Virginia (Cardinal Care)
plans.formularyLabel: Aetna Better Health of Virginia pharmacy & prescription drug benefits (formulary / drug-search landing page; follows statewide PDL / Common Core Formulary)

plans.name: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield (HealthKeepers, Inc.) - Commercial
plans.formularyLabel: Anthem Virginia commercial/individual drug lists & formulary (Select / Essential / National drug lists, 2026)

plans.name: Sentara Health Plans (Optima Health) - Commercial / Employer Group
plans.formularyLabel: Sentara Health Plans employer-group / individual prescription drug lists & formularies (2026)

plans.name: Wellcare Value Script (PDP) - Medicare Part D
plans.formularyLabel: Wellcare Value Script (PDP) 2026 Medicare Part D formulary / drug-list search tool (nationwide PDP, incl. Virginia)

states.name: District of Columbia
states.note: DC Medicaid MCOs run their own formularies within DHCF rules.

plans.name: DC Medicaid (Fee-for-Service) / DC Healthcare Alliance - Preferred Drug List
plans.pbm: Prime Therapeutics (administers pharmacy FFS for DC Dept. of Health Care Finance)
plans.formularyLabel: District of Columbia Medicaid-Approved Preferred Drug List (PDL)

plans.name: AmeriHealth Caritas District of Columbia (DC Healthy Families Medicaid MCO)
plans.pbm: PerformRx (AmeriHealth Caritas Family of Companies affiliate)
plans.formularyLabel: AmeriHealth Caritas DC Drug Formulary (List of Covered Drugs)

plans.name: MedStar Family Choice District of Columbia (DC Healthy Families Medicaid MCO)
plans.formularyLabel: DC Healthy Families Formulary (List of Covered Drugs), Effective 01/01/2026

plans.name: Wellpoint District of Columbia (formerly Amerigroup; DC Healthy Families Medicaid MCO)
plans.formularyLabel: Wellpoint DC Medicaid Pharmacy Benefits / Drug List (landing page; DC MCOs use the unified DC Medicaid PDL administered by Prime Therapeutics)

plans.name: CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield (Individual / Small Group / Exchange - DC Health Link)
plans.formularyLabel: CareFirst 2026 Exchange Formulary (List of Covered Drugs), applies to DC & MD individual/small group

plans.name: Kaiser Permanente of the Mid-Atlantic States (Maryland / Virginia / DC - Marketplace/Commercial)
plans.pbm: Kaiser Permanente in-house pharmacy (integrated; no external PBM)
plans.formularyLabel: Kaiser Permanente Mid-Atlantic Marketplace Formulary (List of Covered Drugs)

plans.name: CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield Medicare Advantage (PPO) - Group Advantage
plans.formularyLabel: CareFirst BlueCross BlueShield Group Advantage (PPO) 2026 Part D Formulary, updated 10/15/2025
